features.name: fscanf with unsigned format specifier %u
features.description: Code should include $fscanf with %u format specifier for scanning unsigned values

features.name: sscanf with unsigned format specifier %u
features.description: Code should include $sscanf with %u format specifier for scanning unsigned values from string

features.name: fscanf with tri-state format specifier %z
features.description: Code should include $fscanf with %z format specifier for scanning tri-state values

features.name: sscanf with tri-state format specifier %z
features.description: Code should include $sscanf with %z format specifier for scanning tri-state values from string

features.name: display with unsigned format specifier %u
features.description: Code should include $display with %u format specifier for displaying unsigned values

features.name: display with tri-state format specifier %z
features.description: Code should include $display with %z format specifier for displaying tri-state values
